title: Repository Set and Policy Creation
interaction_flow_update: Installer::createPlatformRepo(true) → new PlatformRepository([], platformOverrides) → returns PlatformRepository
Installer::createPolicy() → [if minimalUpdate && lockedRepo] LockArrayRepository::getPackages() → builds preferredVersions map
Installer::createPolicy() → new DefaultPolicy(preferStable, preferLowest, preferredVersions?) → returns DefaultPolicy
Installer::createRepositorySet() → new RepositorySet(minimumStability, stabilityFlags, rootAliases, references, rootRequires, temporaryConstraints)
Installer::createRepositorySet() → [if additionalFixedRepository is CompositeRepository] CompositeRepository::getRepositories() → iterate sub-repos
interaction_flow_install: Installer::createPlatformRepo(false) → new PlatformRepository([], platformOverrides) → returns PlatformRepository
Installer::createPolicy(false) → new DefaultPolicy(preferStable, preferLowest, null) → returns DefaultPolicy
Installer::createRepositorySet(false) → LockArrayRepository::getPackages() → builds requires[] as exact-version constraints

key_methods.Installer::createPlatformRepo(bool $forU: Reads platform overrides from Config (forUpdate) or Locker (install); returns new PlatformRepository([], overrides)
key_methods.Installer::createRepositorySet(bool $for: Constructs RepositorySet with stability/flag/alias config; adds RootPackageRepository + PlatformRepository + optional additionalFixedRepository
key_methods.Installer::createPolicy(bool $forUpdate,: Reads preferStable/preferLowest from package (update) or locker (install); optionally builds preferredVersions from locked packages (minimalUpdate mode)
key_methods.Installer::createRequest(RootPackageInte: Creates Request, fixes root package, optionally iterates platform packages to add fixConstraints
key_methods.PlatformRepository::__construct(array $p: Stores overrides; calls parent ArrayRepository::__construct(); initialize() lazy-builds PHP/ext/lib packages
key_methods.PlatformRepository::initialize(): Adds composer, composer-plugin-api, composer-runtime-api, php, php-* variants, all loaded PHP extensions and libraries
key_methods.RepositorySet::__construct(minimumStabil: Sets up stability filtering, alias/reference maps, root requires for pool building
key_methods.RepositorySet::addRepository(RepositoryI: Appends a repository; throws if pool already created

key_relationships: Installer depends_on CompositeRepository (unwraps additionalFixedRepository if composite)
RepositorySet contains RootPackageRepository (fixed root, no requires)
RepositorySet contains external RepositoryManager repos (in update path)
LockArrayRepository used as lockedRepository source for install-mode createRepositorySet
branching_logic: forUpdate=true: stability/flags from root package; aliases from getRootAliases(); remote repos added from RepositoryManager
forUpdate=false: stability/flags from Locker; requires from locked packages (exact versions); lockedRepository added to set
additionalFixedRepository: if CompositeRepository, unwrapped into sub-repos; if contains InstalledRepository → allowInstalledRepositories() called
createPolicy preferredVersions: only set when forUpdate=true AND minimalUpdate=true AND lockedRepo not null
PlatformRepository overrides: packages with version=false are 'disabled'; php-* packages inherit php override
important_notes: Two main entry paths: doUpdate() (forUpdate=true, reads live config) and doInstall() (forUpdate=false, reads from lock file). RepositorySet is the central aggregation point — it holds all repo sources used by PoolBuilder to build the solver Pool. DefaultPolicy governs version selection preference (stable/lowest). PlatformRepository is always added second after RootPackageRepository. LockArrayRepository is added in install mode to lock package versions.
